latex:
Which event is \textbf{most likely} to occur?

A. Rolling a number less than 5 on a six-sided die, numbered from 1 to 6.

B. Spinning a spinner divided into five equal-sized sections colored red/green/yellow/blue/purple and landing on purple.

C. Winning a raffle that sold a total of 100 tickets, if you buy 95 tickets.

D. Reaching into a bag full of 35 strawberry chews and 45 cherry chews without looking and pulling out a strawberry chew.
